programme.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
programme.desc: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the second tier from over the years. Here, back in 2000, Blackburn Rovers and Manchester City go head-to-head in a memorable First Division clash.

programme.title: Jimmy Glass: The Great Escape
programme.desc: 20 years on from Carlisle's remarkable escape from relegation, take a look back at one of football's most extraordinary events. Hear from Jimmy Glass, captain David Brightwell and others.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 11/15. Michael Portillo explores the postwar Britain of his youth on a railway journey from the Midlands to the West Country, beginning in the city of Derby.

programme.title: Coastal Path
programme.desc: 4/5. Paul Rose explores the soft and rolling south Devon coastline, where he takes a snorkelling trip around Burgh Island and hitches a ride on the Dartmouth to Paignton steam train.

programme.title: Brian Cox's Adventures in Space and Time
programme.desc: 3/4. Brian takes a fresh look at the concept of gravity, revealing it to be far more than just the force that makes things fall to the ground.

programme.title: Michael Palin Remembers... Number 27

programme.title: Number 27
programme.desc: Ninety-year-old Miss Barwick has lived peacefully in the same house all her life, that is until a young property developer arrives at her front door. A play by Michael Palin.

programme.title: Castles: Britain's Fortified History
programme.desc: 1/3. Sam Willis shows how the castle arrived as an instrument of invasion with the Normans but became a weapon with which unruly barons challenged the Crown.

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: Unspun World provides an unvarnished version of the week's major global news stories - reliable, honest and essential viewing with the BBC's world affairs editor, John Simpson.

programme.title: Keep the World Away - Finding Gwen John
programme.desc: Radio 1 DJ Sian Eleri explores the life and work of painter Gwen John on the 150th anniversary of her birth.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Lost Liners
programme.desc: Normandie: The SS Normandie entered service in 1935 and remains the most powerful steam turbo-electric-propelled passenger ship ever built. (1 of 6)

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Hidden Wonders: Most of the world's holiest places sit in plain sight, but there are some hidden deep underground. (S1, ep 6)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The Lost Colony of Roanoke: In 1587, settlers land on Roanoke Island to establish the first English colony in America, but vanish without a trace and leave only cryptic clues. (S4, ep 4)

programme.title: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: The world's most haunted doll shows off its magic, a family in Oklahoma has a ghostly new roommate and a misty cryptid is caught on a security cam in the woods of Wisconsin. (S8, ep 5)

programme.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
programme.desc: Scarred: The paranormal leaves its mark figuratively and literally on innocent victims while a brother and sister encounter a malicious entity in the basement. (S2, ep 7)

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: UFO Over the Andes, the Ohio Grassman, and Ancient Horn Mystery: Did a Chilean family photograph a real UFO over the Andes? And does a huge fossil point to a prehistoric figure? (S4, ep 2)

programme.title: Secret Restoration
programme.desc: Picture This: PJ and the restoration team become arcade heroes as they bring a classic video game back to life. Meanwhile, LA makes a sailor's tool chest seaworthy once again. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Secret Restoration
programme.desc: Sew Gripping: The restorers stitch and grip as they refurbish a vintage Singer sewing machine. Plus, a carnival grip tester is brought back to its original glory. (S1, ep 8)

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: St Helens 2: Join David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal, or will they take a chance at auction instead? (S10, ep 60)

programme.title: New: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Lone Star Stakes: With the help of a few trusted companions, Rick, Corey and Chum hope to round up some gems in Austin, Texas. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: ...Henry and Sam's Wreck-trospective. Henry and Sam try and break into the classic tractor market. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Emperor of El Monte: Buyers Darrell, Brandon, Jarrod, Brandi and Ivy head to El Monte, California where they tackle the local competition head on. (S7, ep 9)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Hestered in the Highlands: The buyers head to the hills of Murietta for an auction that has tensions and prices running high. Dave drives Darrell to breaking point. (S7, ep 10)

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Millionaire Mayhem: Les works at breakneck pace to customise a $20,000 diamond ring. And when Ashley unjustifiably derails the sale, no-one blames Seth for hitting the roof. (S6, ep 4)

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Urban Hillbilly: A customer hits the roof after Seth busts him for trying to flog fake goods. Later, panic grips the staff as a farmer lets an animal loose in the shop. (S6, ep 5)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Hidden Hot Wheels: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 muscle car and a single-shot pistol. (S3, ep 13)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Gangs Of New York: Ton and Allen take on a local thrift store gang in Brooklyn. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon. (S3, ep 14)

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Working Blind: Phil Risko's team work to re-float a trawler that has been blown onto a national park's shore, improvising to get it back to sea before it suffers further damage. (S2, ep 6)

programme.title: Salvage Kings
programme.desc: Biting Off More Than He Can Chew: Ted and his buddy Adam take on a tricky demolition job with a big potential upside, but the risks are huge. (S3, ep 4)

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Lone Star Stakes: With the help of a few trusted companions, Rick, Corey and Chum hope to round up some gems in Austin, Texas. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Auction Boogaloo: Fierce competition greets Rene and Casey as they return to the auctions. Dave adds to the heat before unearthing a fantastic piece of board game history. (S7, ep 11)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Locktoberfest: Darrell and Brandon have high hopes as they return to the site of their biggest score. The others bid to take down the self-proclaimed "King of Montebello". (S7, ep 12)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: ...Henry and Sam's Wreck-trospective. Henry and Sam visit Normous Newark Autojumble and come away with a challenge. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Mystery of the Standing Stones: According to Ancient Astronaut Theorists, the placement of monoliths and their geological makeup could point to extraterrestrial intervention. (S14, ep 2)

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened

programme.desc: Go. Wonderblock Go gets everything and everyone moving! It's noisy, exciting fun. However, things start to go wrong quickly until Wonderblock Stop arrives.

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: Pink. Fun Pink arrives in Colourland. Learn about the colour pink with the Colourblocks!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Whistling Badge. Animated preschool series. When Egg goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. The Squirrels want to learn how to whistle too.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: The Fly Past. On migration day, the gang try to find the right sound to get a response from the geese.

programme.title: Something Special: We're All Friends
programme.desc: Pets. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Mr Tumble looks for his pet dog's squeaky toy bone, while Justin spends the day with his friends and their pet dogs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Train Ride. Preschool series. Po makes far too much tubby custard, and the children in Tummy Tales take a ride on a steam train.

programme.title: Patchwork Pals

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Go Bananas. Stop-frame animation featuring Raa Raa, who lives in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa and the others pick masses of lovely bananas for Ooo Ooo's banana party.

programme.title: Dodge's Pup School
programme.desc: Class Star. Dodge is eager to win the Class Star award, but how will he outshine Cherry the superstar at everything? Dodge discovers the real key to winning Class Star is by trying his best.

programme.title: Gigglebiz
programme.desc: Episode 12. Gardener Will Barrow finds all kinds of animals hiding in his wellington boot.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Water Machines. Series for young children that celebrates many different kinds of amazing machines. In this episode, Grace shows off three incredible machines that can go on water!

programme.title: New: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: Make Up Your Mind, Nina! The Game Catchers land on a new planet and learn to play spider's web. Before they can begin, they must help an indecisive Catercoon confidently shed its cocoon.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Damselfish. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts help a group of algae-eating fish stand up to some aggressive damselfish.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: The Tale of the Greedy Fox. Animated series. Peter tells an impulsive lie which leads Jemima Puddle-Duck into Mr Tod's clutches.

programme.title: Hey Duggee

programme.title: New: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Daphne's Dental Day. Daphne is very excited to show off her clean teeth at the clinic's Dental Day.

programme.title: Supertato

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: Mission Cheerleading. Weasy turns into an unbearable coach when the Ducklings lose a race against the eaglets.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Omelette. Bingo makes an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but there are delays in the kitchen.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Piripenguins

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: (2020) Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: (2019) Horror based on Stephen King's novel. A family move to the countryside for the quiet life. But there's a road with speeding trucks and a pet cemetery that resurrects the dead...

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: Getting Personal with...
programme.desc: ...Chris Fonseca: In this Getting Personal episode Deepa meets Chris Fonseca, the deaf dancer, to find out more about the man behind the moves.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Violent Men
programme.desc: (1955) Cold War-influenced western starring Glenn Ford and Edward G Robinson. A smallholder stands alone against the expansionist plans and brutal tactics of a tyrannical rancher.

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: (1946) Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

programme.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
programme.desc: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

programme.title: Written on the Wind
programme.desc: (1956) Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack, Rock Hudson and Dorothy Malone star in Douglas Sirk's drama, a commentary on 1950s life that's disguised as a lurid, glossy soap opera.

programme.title: Romancing the Stone
programme.desc: (1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: (2020) Action-comedy starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence. Just when Marcus is planning to retire, a vengeful drug lord's son shoots Mike. Can our dynamic duo beat the cartel?

programme.title: Snake Eyes
programme.desc: (2021) Violent martial arts action. A brooding cage fighter (Henry Golding) is contracted to assassinate a target but saves him instead, so that he can infiltrate an ancient ninja society.

programme.title: Good Boys
programme.desc: (2019) Coming-of-age comedy about three young boys embarking on a brand new, terrifying adventure: sixth grade. Girls, kissing and an epic four-mile journey await.

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Black Swan
programme.desc: (1942) Swashbuckling adventure with Laird Cregar and Tyrone Power. Privateer Captain Henry Morgan tries to rid the Caribbean of pirates when he's made Governor of Jamaica. Bit rich.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

programme.title: The Man from Colorado
programme.desc: (1948) Western. When a sadistic Union colonel (Glenn Ford) becomes a federal judge after the Civil War, his friend (William Holden) takes the deputy job to try and temper his actions.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: (1963) Cary Grant and Audrey Hepburn star Stanley Donen's stylish Hitchcockian comedy-thriller. When her husband is murdered, a woman discovers that he was involved in a huge gold heist.

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary...
programme.desc: ...Gentlemen: (2003) Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war?

programme.title: Alice, Darling
programme.desc: (2022) Provocative psychological thriller with Anna Kendrick. A woman's friends stage an intervention to get her to see she's in a controlling relationship. But what will the boyfriend do?

programme.title: The Drop
programme.desc: (2014) Tense thriller with Tom Hardy, James Gandolfini, Noomi Rapace and Matthias Schoenaerts. Two cousins get into trouble with the gangsters who use their bar to launder illicit cash.

programme.title: Heat and Dust
programme.desc: (1982) Drama with Julie Christie. A woman travels to India to learn about the scandal her great aunt was involved in 60 years earlier. Upsetting scenes/attitudes of the era that may offend.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: (1954) Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
programme.desc: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

programme.title: Broken Lance
programme.desc: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth. Violence.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (2007) Western starring Christian Bale and Russell Crowe. An impoverished rancher tries to earn some money and his family's respect by escorting a dangerous outlaw on his way to jail.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: (2020) Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: (2019) Horror based on Stephen King's novel. A family move to the countryside for the quiet life. But there's a road with speeding trucks and a pet cemetery that resurrects the dead...

programme.title: The Violent Men
programme.desc: (1955) Cold War-influenced western starring Glenn Ford and Edward G Robinson. A smallholder stands alone against the expansionist plans and brutal tactics of a tyrannical rancher.

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: (1946) Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

programme.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
programme.desc: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

programme.title: Written on the Wind
programme.desc: (1956) Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack, Rock Hudson and Dorothy Malone star in Douglas Sirk's drama, a commentary on 1950s life that's disguised as a lurid, glossy soap opera.

programme.title: Romancing the Stone
programme.desc: (1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
